ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Continued To Mar-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom: Elizabeth M. Button, Esq for Amber Murphy (Petitioner).

At the request of the Court, Ms. Button provided an update stating that this matter depends on a class action in New York, that to date the New York matter has not proceeded, that she is in communication with the attorney in New York, and that currently there is no money in the estate. Ms. Button apologized for not asking in advance for time to continue status on the administration of this estate noting that she will be filing a petition to seek addtional time. The Court stated that it would grant the additional time because it expects that Ms. Button's petition requesting additional time to administer this estate will be on file before the next hearing date and a new date set for that petition.

The status on close of estate is continued to March 6, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
